summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: one opening callback to Chapter 6's hidden watch-note action, and one closing timing/handoff alignment into Chapter 8's 4:40 wake-up and 6:30 Midtown qualifier scene.
edits: Added an opening line that the folded strip remains tucked behind Maya's cracked watch strap, linking directly to Chapter 6's final action.
Adjusted end-of-night countdown from six hours/fifty-three minutes to five hours/fifty-three minutes to match the stated 4:40 wake-up.
Added explicit six-thirty Midtown qualifier handoff in the closing paragraph to bridge into Chapter 8's opening setting.
